name: AI Self-Improvement Plugin
description: A self-improvement plugin where AI analyzes, improves, and generates AI capabilities. Provides quality analysis of existing Skills, automatic generation of improved versions, auto-tuning of Judge criteria based on Experience Memory, automatic Skill generation from failure patterns, and A/B testing between Skills. Operates within individual development scope as the first step of AI Self-Improvement.
use_cases: Code quality analysis and improvement suggestions for existing Skills
Auto-tuning Judge Layer criteria based on Experience Memory
Automatic generation of failure-prevention Skills from Failure Taxonomy
A/B test comparison of multiple Skills for the same task
Auto-generation of test code and coverage analysis for Skills
Version management and before/after comparison of Skill improvements

capabilities.skill_analysis: AI evaluates existing Skills for code quality, performance, and error handling, then generates specific improvement proposals
capabilities.experience_driven_tuning: Analyzes approval/rejection patterns from Experience Memory and auto-suggests custom rules for the Judge Layer
capabilities.failure_learning: Detects similar failure patterns from accumulated Failure Taxonomy data and auto-creates prevention Skills via the natural language generation API
capabilities.ab_testing: Executes the same task with multiple Skills, quantitatively compares quality, speed, and cost to recommend the optimal Skill
capabilities.auto_testing: Analyzes Skill code and auto-generates test cases for both normal and error paths, then executes and reports results
capabilities.version_control: Version-manages Skills before and after improvements, enabling rollback at any time

integration.judge_layer: Auto-generate and propose custom rules for the Judge Layer from Experience Memory analysis results
integration.experience_memory: Accumulate improvement cycle results in Experience Memory to enhance future improvement accuracy
integration.failure_taxonomy: Use failure classification data as input to determine the need for new Skills
integration.skill_registry: Register generated and improved Skills in the Registry (after approval)
integration.dag: Manage A/B test execution as DAGs for efficient parallel comparison

safety.sandbox_execution: All new and improved Skills are test-executed in a sandbox
safety.approval_required: User approval is always required for Skill application and Judge criteria changes
safety.rollback: All improvements are version-managed and can be rolled back with one click
safety.quality_threshold: Improvements that fall below Judge Layer quality standards are auto-rejected
safety.change_limit: Upper limit set for changes per cycle (runaway prevention)
safety.kill_switch: Emergency stop mechanism to immediately halt the Self-Improvement loop

limitations.individual_scope: Operates within individual development scope — training data is limited to the individual's usage patterns
limitations.model_dependency: Quality of improvement proposals depends on the LLM model's capabilities
limitations.no_architecture_change: Skill-level improvements only. Architecture-level self-improvement is planned for Phase 4+
limitations.manual_approval: All improvement applications require user manual approval (full automation planned for Phase 3+)

note: This plugin implements Phase 1 (individual development scope) of AI Self-Improvement. All 6 Skills, API endpoints, and schemas are fully implemented. As the community grows and shared data increases, more advanced self-improvement becomes possible in Phase 2+.
author: Zero-Employee Orchestrator Team
